data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to reschedule a single instance, which is a specific need outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any steps or API interactions that demonstrate this functionality. The linked use case mentions the ability to move one cleaning to a different day, but there is no concrete evidence or prior steps that confirm the implementation of this requirement, indicating a gap in coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the ability to reschedule a single instance.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to reschedule a single instance.
